heading: Definitions
label: 184 Definitions
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 17, 1976section 17 of Pub. L. 94–521section 1 of this title

children.text: the term “local unit of general purpose government” means the government of a county, municipality, township, Indian tribe, Alaskan native village, or other unit of government (other than a State) which is a unit of general government, and
the term “State” includes the District of Columbia.
